data.description: If it is touched, Yellow Mold is acidic and destroys leather and wood. It deals [[/r 1d6 #Acidic mold!]] points of damage to bare flesh. There is a 50% probability that any time yellow mold is contacted, it ejects spores into a 10' cube area. Any creature inside the area is required to roll a saving throw versus Poison, and failure indicates suffocation and death in [[/r 6 #Death from choking in this many rounds!]] rounds from the inhaled spores.
